gen_sword_001.name: Rusted Shortsword
gen_sword_001.description: A pitted, rusted blade. It's better than a sharp rock.

gen_staff_001.name: Gnarled Branch
gen_staff_001.description: A thick, gnarled branch picked up from the forest floor. It hums faintly.

gen_armor_001.name: Tattered Tunic
gen_armor_001.description: Moth-eaten and stained, but it's another layer between you and the world.

gen_rogue_armor_001.name: Worn Leather Vest
gen_rogue_armor_001.description: Supple leather, worn thin by use, but allows freedom of movement.

gen_accessory_001.name: Twine Bracelet
gen_accessory_001.description: A simple loop of twine. Smells faintly of moss.

gen_dagger_003.name: Iron Dirk
gen_dagger_003.description: A standard-issue iron dagger. Dependable and sharp.

gen_robe_003.name: Acolyte's Robe
gen_robe_003.description: A heavy wool robe dyed deep indigo.

gen_accessory_003c.name: Polished Stone
gen_accessory_003c.description: A smooth river stone warm to the touch.

gen_sword_005.name: Hunter's Falchion
gen_sword_005.description: A curved heavy blade designed for hide and bone.

gen_staff_005.name: Aether-Channeling Staff
gen_staff_005.description: A willow staff capped with raw magic stone.

gen_accessory_005c.name: Signet of the Old Guild
gen_accessory_005c.description: A silver ring bearing an ancient guild crest.

gen_sword_007.name: Kingslayer Claymore
gen_sword_007.description: A massive blade rumored to end dynasties.

gen_dagger_006.name: Nightshade Stiletto
gen_dagger_006.description: Coated in a poison feared by nobles.

gen_staff_007.name: Eldertree Soulbranch
gen_staff_007.description: Carved from the roots of a mythical eldertree.

gen_accessory_007.name: Charm of Windsong
gen_accessory_007.description: Sings softly when fortune favors you.

gen_heavyarmor_006c.name: Colossusplate Shell
gen_heavyarmor_006c.description: Made from the remains of a colossal titan.

gen_accessory_008.name: Emblem of Infinite Fortune
gen_accessory_008.description: Whispers with the winds of destiny.

gen_sword_009.name: Eclipsebreaker
gen_sword_009.description: Forged in the heart of a dying star.

gen_staff_009.name: Staff of the Worldheart
gen_staff_009.description: Contains a spark from creation itself.

gen_heavyarmor_007.name: World-Titan Carapace
gen_heavyarmor_007.description: Forged from the armor of an elder titan.

gen_accessory_009.name: Mythic Soul Sigil
gen_accessory_009.description: Hums with the echo of a forgotten god.
